action.reasoning: Iteration 1: Pi0 loaded successfully, but forward pass failed due to time dimension in image batch (expected 4D, got 5D). Need to fix to use per-step images. Also need to verify tokenizer loading, adapt data (2 views→3, 8D→32D, 7D→32D with zero-pad), and build training pipeline. First, fix the test script to validate full forward + tokenization, then write minimal train/smoke script to test data loading and model fine-tuning. Since a full eval costs ~2h, I'll first build a local Agent test to validate control output shape, then submit an eval with a dummy checkpoint to measure eval iteration time and confirm pipeline connectivity. This early eval will also give a baseline (likely 0) and cost analysis.
